task: Plan a small AIDE-style code optimization run from an automatically scaffolded note.
user_prompt: Given a small ML engineering task with executable Python code and a validation metric, produce an AIDE-style run plan that is executable in a local harness. The plan must include a solution tree, objective function, search policy, draft/debug/improve actions, context summarization, data preview, validation protocol, final solution selection, and known limitations.

required_capabilities.description: Plan frames ML engineering as code-solution optimization with a stateless objective.
Plan preserves tree nodes, edges, scores, and final best solution selection.
Plan includes draft/debug/improve policy with debug-depth constraints.
Plan includes specialized coding actions and atomic measurable changes.
Plan keeps prompts concise with historical summaries.
Plan includes static task data preview for code decisions.
Plan remembers evaluated benchmarks and reported metrics.
Plan preserves limitation and stop-condition evidence.
Context includes source anchors or equivalent traceability.
